_comment: Layer-2 routing tests for the DL-Project setup. Each skill lists prompts that SHOULD route to it (should_fire) and prompts that must NOT (should_not_fire). Run: python tools/validate_claude_setup.py claude-setups/DL-Project --route. The default runner is a deterministic nearest-description classifier (stdlib); add --route-model to check against the real router.

should_fire: export the trained model to the ESP32-S3 with int8 quantization
will this network fit in the 8 MB PSRAM and Flash budget on device
prune and quantize the classifier for TFLite-Micro
should_not_fire: build the log-Mel spectrograms for the 3 second clips
record in the decision log why we picked this threshold

should_fire: resample audio to 16 kHz mono and produce log-Mel spectrograms
set the librosa params for feature extraction and augmentation
mix fall sounds with water leakage at a controlled SNR
should_not_fire: export the model to the microcontroller and quantize it
mount Google Drive inside the Colab notebook

should_fire: set up an Optuna study to optimize the F2 metric
comparing two training trials and defending the threshold tuning
record why we chose this metric in the decision log
should_not_fire: quantize the model for on-device deployment to the ESP32
produce the log-Mel spectrograms from raw audio

should_fire: the Colab notebook disconnected, how do I checkpoint to Google Drive
wire the notebook data paths to GCS and Drive
move this logic out of the notebook into src
should_not_fire: optimize the F2 objective with an Optuna study
estimate whether the model fits in PSRAM on the ESP32
